saved_test.name: Cleft Sentences and Emphasis: V3 All Levels

questions.question: Choose the sentence that correctly expresses contrastive focus: {a1}

a1.answer: It was Maria not Tom who signed the letter
options: It was Maria not Tom who signed the letter
Maria signed the letter
It was not Maria but Tom who signed the letter
What signed the letter was Maria

the plan changed the result
